caption: Four young children sit together on a dirt ground in an outdoor rural setting with sparse greenery in the background. The child on the far left wears a red and blue top and brown pants, remaining mostly still while holding their hand to their mouth. Next to them, a child in a beige and brown shirt laughs and leans toward the third child, who is dressed in a black t-shirt and black pants. This third child smiles and looks toward the second child, reacting to the interaction. The child on the far right wears a white patterned top and dark pants, sitting calmly with their hands in their lap. As time progresses, the children shift their positions slightly; the second child moves their arm and leans back, while the third child leans further toward the right, resting a hand on the ground.
